title: Sunrise Scholar PG
description: Bright study-friendly PG with biometric entry, daily meals, power backup, and coaching shuttle access.

reviews.comment: Very clean rooms and the warden is genuinely helpful during exam season.
Food quality is solid and the location is perfect for classes.

title: Urban Nest Student Stay
description: Single occupancy rooms with high-speed Wi-Fi, laundry, study lounge, and metro connectivity.

reviews.comment: Fast internet and peaceful common room for coding sessions.

title: Metro Vista Co-Living
description: Premium studio-style PG with attached bath, smart lock, gaming lounge, and rooftop cafe.

reviews.comment: Feels more like a compact apartment than a PG.

title: Campus Corner Residency
description: Budget-friendly stay near engineering colleges with meal plan, study area, and secure parking.

reviews.comment: Affordable and close to campus, though unfurnished as listed.

title: Pink City Study Suites
description: Warm and airy PG with curated study pods, nutritious meals, and weekend housekeeping.

reviews.comment: Beautiful common areas and the meals are much better than expected.

title: Capital Hub Living
description: Modern student stay close to libraries and coaching centres with AC rooms and app-based entry.

reviews.comment: Great security and connectivity, but book early because it fills up fast.
